name: SkillStore
description: Enterprise skill catalog for Claude Code — curated, versioned skills for higher education institutions.
author: philkomarny

skills.name: prospect-outreach
skills.description: Generate personalized outreach to prospective students across recruitment funnel stages.

skills.name: application-reviewer
skills.description: Review and score student applications with holistic evaluation rubrics.

skills.name: enrollment-campaign
skills.description: Analyze enrollment marketing campaign performance and optimize recruitment spend.

skills.name: content-brief
skills.description: Create content briefs for program pages, recruitment materials, and institutional content.

skills.name: curriculum-designer
skills.description: Design and map course curricula with learning outcomes, assessments, and competency alignment.

skills.name: accreditation-writer
skills.description: Write self-study reports, compliance narratives, and accreditation documentation.

skills.name: early-alert-responder
skills.description: Triage student early alerts, draft intervention plans, and generate retention reports.

skills.name: grant-proposal-writer
skills.description: Write grant proposals, budgets, and compliance narratives for federal and private funding.
